title: Farmer's Cursor
description: Farmer's-Delight-inspired cursors made for Minecraft Cursor mod.
body:
![All the cursors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc1ce487385a453076479620cd66b99ef9fc7a60.png)

This is a resource pack for the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/project/o5fhgLeQ) mod by fishstiz, providing stylized cursors perfect for farming, survival, vanilla+ or any other theme in a modpack!

Highly inspired by the Farmer's Delight mod!
